name: Fresh Corn Bisque with Green Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 clove garlic, minced (or 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion, carrot, celery, and garlic. Cook, stirring for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in turmeric and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add bay leaf and water, then bring to a simmer.
5. Add corn and simmer for 10 minutes. Discard the bay leaf.
6. Season with salt and cayenne pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot or cold and garnish with green onions or parsley.
